name: Fried Chicken
recipeIngredient: 2 1/2 pounds fryer (up to 3 lbs), cut into servings
recipeInstructions:
1. Rinse chicken pieces and pat dry.
2. In a shallow dish, combine the flour with the remaining ingredients except butter. Mix well to coat.
3. Toss the chicken pieces in the flour mixture until evenly coated.
4. Heat enough butter or oil in a skillet to reach a depth of 1/4 inch.
5. Cook the chicken over medium-high heat until golden brown. This should take about 6-8 minutes per side, working in batches if necessary.
6. Transfer the cooked chicken to a Crock-Pot. Place wings first, then add any accumulated juices from the skillet.
7. Cover and cook on Low for 8 to 10 hours or on High for 4 to 5 hours.
Serves 4
